title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git workflows including branches, commits, diffs, merges, and pull requests to database tables. It addresses data version control and collaboration challenges for ML datasets, test data, configs, and production changes using a content-addressable storage approach.
